text:
Okarun understands it now #DANDADAN
Thrown headfirst into musical mayhem, Okarun discovers a new way to harness Turbo Granny's powers.

Seasons 1 and 2 of DAN DA DAN are now playing on Netflix.

The mystery around Jiji's family boils over as Momo, Okarun and Turbo Granny investigate the strange hot spring town and its even stranger secrets.
